name: BPC-157
description: Body Protection Compound - 15 amino acid peptide known for research applications in tissue protection and recovery studies.
details: Stable pentadecapeptide (15 amino acids) derived from human gastric juice. Currently under investigation for its effects on various tissue types in laboratory settings.

name: TB-500
description: Thymosin Beta-4 - Synthetic version of a naturally occurring peptide involved in cellular structure regulation.
details: 43-amino acid peptide that plays a crucial role in actin regulation. Extensively studied for its effects on cell migration and differentiation in research models.

name: Semaglutide
description: GLP-1 receptor agonist for metabolic research applications.
details: Synthetic analogue of the human glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1). Used extensively in metabolic and appetite regulation studies.

name: Tirzepatide
description: Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist for advanced metabolic research.
details: Novel synthetic peptide that activates both GIP and GLP-1 receptors. Cutting-edge tool for metabolic and diabetes research.

name: AOD-9604
description: Modified fragment of human growth hormone for lipid research.
details: Synthetic peptide derived from the C-terminal region of human growth hormone (hGH 177-191). Studied for its effects on lipid metabolism.

name: MOTS-c
description: Mitochondrial-derived peptide for metabolic and aging research.
details: 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome. Regulates metabolic homeostasis and cellular energy sensing.

name: SS-31
description: Mitochondrial-targeted peptide for oxidative stress research.
details: Small, synthetic peptide that selectively targets and accumulates in the inner mitochondrial membrane. Studied for mitochondrial protection.

name: Epithalon
description: Synthetic tetrapeptide for telomere and aging research.
details: Synthetic tetrapeptide (Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly) that stimulates telomerase activity in experimental models. Focus of longevity research.
